front: Novel: set during India's Emergency; Parsi woman Dina Dalal hires untouchable tailors Ishvar and Omprakash
Novel: Maneck Kohlah is paying student boarder in this novel about the Emergency
Novel: Ishvar loses legs and Om is castrated at Family Planning Center after procedure ordered by Thakur
Novel: in epilogue, Maneck commits suicide by letting himself get run over by a train
Novel: Beggarmaster manages a troupe of people with diverse deformities
Novel: helicopter causes giant cutout of leader to topple on civilians
Novel: Gustad Noble in 1971 Bombay; money laundering scheme with Jimmy Bilimoria during Bangladesh war
Novel: withdrawn from University of Mumbai syllabus after Thackeray complaint; critical of Shiv Sena
Novel: protagonist told to 'hug the bear' — dancing bear named Kano holds secret message
Short story: man returns home because he can't use Canadian toilets; Dr. No-Ilaaz can't help
back: "Squatter" from Tales from Firozsha Baag (Rohinton Mistry)

front: Novel: set in Mumbai, described as 'the city by the sea'; Dina sews patterns for Au Revoir Exports
